description: Use case scoring per product on a 1-10 scale. Higher scores indicate stronger suitability for the given use case.

strengths: Excellent entry point for learning espresso fundamentals
PID control at an accessible price
Commercial 58mm group head uses standard accessories
limitations: Single boiler means waiting between brewing and steaming

strengths: Dual boilers allow simultaneous brewing and steaming
E61 group head provides excellent thermal stability
Rotary pump is quiet and powerful
Great for milk drink workflows
limitations: Heavier learning curve than automatic machines
Requires a quality grinder to maximize potential
No flow control or pressure profiling

strengths: Ultra-compact design fits anywhere
Rapid 3-minute heat-up
Lightweight enough for travel
PID control despite compact size
limitations: Small water tank requires frequent refills
Steam wand is basic, limited latte art potential

strengths: Saturated group head for rock-solid temperature stability
Built-in flow profiling opens creative possibilities
Plumb-in option for serious setups
Commercial-level build quality
limitations: Steep learning curve for flow profiling

strengths: Triple boiler with gear pump is the ultimate extraction platform
Full pressure profiling with saveable profiles
Touchscreen with real-time extraction graphing
Integrated shot scale for precision dosing
limitations: Highest price point in the lineup
Requires significant knowledge to leverage fully

strengths: Dual group heads handle high volume with ease
50+ cups per day capacity
Commercial-grade reliability
Programmable volumetric dosing
Truly portable at only 1.2 kg
No electricity required
Surprisingly good espresso for a manual device
Works with ESE pods for ultimate convenience
limitations: No steam wand for milk drinks

strengths: One-touch operation for 8 different drinks
Built-in grinder grinds fresh for every cup
Automatic milk system requires no technique
45-second heat-up time
limitations: Built-in grinder quality does not match standalone grinders
Automatic milk system cannot match manual steam wand results

strengths: Optimized specifically for filter grind range
Excellent particle uniformity for pour-over
Affordable entry point for quality grinding
Compact footprint
limitations: 30-step adjustment is less precise than stepless

strengths: True all-rounder from espresso to French press
Conical burrs produce sweet, full-bodied flavor
Macro + micro adjustment for precise dialing in
Excellent value for the versatility offered
limitations: Does not match flat burr clarity for light roast espresso
0.8g retention means some waste between dose changes
Not a specialist at any single brew method

strengths: 64mm flat burrs produce exceptional clarity and definition
Stepless adjustment for infinite precision
Very low 0.5g retention
Excellent for medium and light roast espresso
83mm SSP burrs produce world-class grind quality
Near-zero retention means every dose is fresh
Effortless switching between coffees and brew methods
Premium build quality and materials
limitations: Highest price point in grinder lineup
Single dose workflow is slower than hopper grinders
Requires a separate scale for dosing
